steps.title: Interpret the constant term
steps.content: The function is $f(t)=14t+9$. The constant term $9$ is the value of the function when $t=0$.

steps.title: Use t = 0
steps.content: Substitute $t=0$: $$f(0)=14(0)+9=9.$$ Since $t=0$ is the moment Tavon purchased the plant, the plant's estimated length then was $9$ inches.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: This matches choice D. The $14$ is the monthly growth rate, while $9$ is the initial length.
